nodes.name: sciona.pronto.inverse_schmitt
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.critic_notes: Converted from a flat pronto module so metadata backfills resolve the family namespace correctly.

nodes.name: inverse_schmitt_trigger_transform
nodes.description: Apply an inverse Schmitt trigger with hysteresis to a 1D signal.
nodes.conceptual_summary: Stateless hysteresis threshold transform with a preserved prior-state region between low and high thresholds.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
